message.content:
Explore the existing reference implementations in design/reference/ to understand what technologies are being used and how interactions are implemented. Look at:
1. dashboard-threejs.html - How pan/zoom is implemented
2. meso-view-pixijs.html - If it has any interactions
3. Any other HTML files in that directory

Focus on: event handling for pan/zoom, camera/viewport management, and any issues with smooth interactions.

content.text: I'll explore the reference implementations to understand the technologies and interaction patterns being used.
